allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('build:', d.get\('scripts',{}\).get\('build',''\)\); print\('tsc:', d.get\('scripts',{}\).get\('tsc',''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); scripts=d.get\('scripts',{}\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in scripts.items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'checker' in k.lower\(\) or 'tsc' in k.lower\(\) or 'typescript' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('engines:', d.get\('engines',{}\)\); print\('node version requirement:', d.get\('engines',{}\).get\('node',''\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('supabase:', deps.get\('@supabase/supabase-js','not found'\)\); print\('react:', deps.get\('react','not found'\)\); print\('vite:', deps.get\('vite','not found'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkg=d.get\('packages',{}\).get\('node_modules/@supabase/supabase-js',{}\); print\('supabase exact:', pkg.get\('version','not found'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkg=d.get\('packages',{}\).get\('node_modules/typescript',{}\); print\('typescript in lockfile:', pkg.get\('version','not found'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs=d.get\('packages',{}\); [print\(k.split\('/'\)[-1], ':', v.get\('version','?'\)\) for k,v in pkgs.items\(\) if '@types' in k and 'node_modules' in k]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs=d.get\('packages',{}\); [print\(k, ':', v.get\('version','?'\)\) for k,v in pkgs.items\(\) if 'react' in k.lower\(\) and 'node_modules' in k]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Name:', d.get\('name',''\)\); print\('Deps:', list\(d.get\('dependencies',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
